creator: david.vionnet@vmailbox.org
text:
Created attachment 149463
edbrowse-3.5.1.diff

Update of edbrowse from version 3.4.10 to version 3.5.1. This new version
uses lang/spidermonkey24 instead of lang/spidermonkey17.
Sending and receiving mail is now taken care of by curl which replace the
home-grown pop3 and smtp software.
